name: Pro Wrestling
description:
Pro Wrestling is a 2D wrestling game featuring a roster of unique wrestlers, each with distinct stats and signature moves. The game focuses on arcade-style wrestling action, emphasizing fast-paced matches and strategic grapples. 

The core gameplay loop involves moving around the ring, grappling with opponents, executing strikes, and performing throws and submissions. Wrestlers build up a meter through successful attacks and taunts. When the meter is full, they can unleash their signature move, a high-impact attack that can dramatically shift the momentum of the match.

The game includes several match types, including one-on-one matches, tag team matches (2v2), and championship matches, where the player can challenge for a title. The win condition is typically pinning the opponent for a three-count, forcing a submission, or winning by count-out if the opponent remains outside the ring for too long. There's also a 'rope break' mechanic during pin attempts and submission holds.

The AI opponent will vary in difficulty and fighting style. Some might focus on strikes, others on grapples, and some might employ a more balanced approach. Stamina is a factor; wrestlers become slower and weaker as their stamina depletes, making strategic resting crucial. Finally, the game includes ring out rules; if a wrestler remains outside of the ring for a certain period, they will be counted out and lose the match. A ref will be present on the screen.

controls.space: Pin opponent when near a downed opponent or break free from a pin attempt or submission
controls.q: Special move 1 (requires a full signature move meter)
controls.e: Special move 2 (requires a full signature move meter)
controls.x: Irish whip (throw opponent towards the ropes after a grapple)
